units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the essential foundational introduction to Apex, preparing for subsequent hands-on coding and data manipulation.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Focuses on using sObjects, a fundamental hands-on concept for interacting with Salesforce data programmatically in Apex.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: Directly addresses hands-on record manipulation using DML, a core Apex skill for creating, updating, and deleting data.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Teaches how to write SOQL queries, a crucial hands-on skill for retrieving specific data from the Salesforce database using Apex.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: Covers writing SOSL queries, providing another hands-on method for searching data in Apex, complementing SOQL for broader searches.
